positive: A symmetrical, circular mandala design incorporating stylized forest fauna and celestial elements. The composition features detailed outlines of majestic deer antlers, crystalline moons, bioluminescent foliage, and flowing river motifs. The style is intricate neo-art nouveau linework combined with bold, flat geometric sections. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep indigo, sage green, gold ochre, and charcoal grey. The lighting should be ethereal and uniform, emphasizing stark contrast and clean, defined silhouettes suitable for screen printing. Central focus, high detail, seamless pattern potential, vector quality, perfect for apparel print.
